item.name: Oschon's Stone
item.description:
Seemingly living up to its namesake, this heavy and largely immobile wavekin spends most of its life on the ocean floor. It feeds by opening its mouth and waiting for curious prey to swim inside.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: If the legends are true, this fish came to be when Oschon, god of wanderers and vagrants, cast a stone into the ocean which then gained sentience. Despite this and the passage of countless centuries, however, the stone has somehow yet to realize it has become a fish.
